block.moretraffic.control_cabinet.descri: Can be used to make complex systems and automations that control other TrafficCraft blocks
block.moretraffic.blinker.description: Turn on with redstone or with Control Cabinet. Paint to change colors
item.moretraffic.light.description: Right-click a traffic pole to create an advanced traffic light. Click again to add lights. Sneak & right-click with Wrench to remove one
block.moretraffic.traffic_display.descri: Used as overhead traffic displays to show current information. Can be controlled via Control Cabinet.
block.moretraffic.led_light.description: Model shape and size can be customized. Can be controlled via Control Cabinet.
Scale of traffic light (doesent work yet)
gui.moretraffic.import_invalid_data: No valid data in clipboard, please make sure you copied the exported NBT correctly
gui.moretraffic.advanced_traffic_light.o:
Choose a static color for this light, or click black to turn it off.
Keep in mind that using control cabinet may override this color.
Using masking, shapes or pictograms (turning arrows, pedestrian icon, etc.) can be displayed on lights. Unlike in trafficcraft, masks can be unique for each light.
Start by drawing your mask, or use the buttons on the right to import or export

Left mouse button: click and hold to add pixels,
Right mouse button: click and hold to delete pixels
Load a mask from your clipboard
Copy the mask data to your clipboard. This is a string of numbers, so you can paste it outside of the game too
Turn an 16x16 image into a mask
For best results, use a 16x16 image with transparent and filled pixels. May not work perfectly.
gui.moretraffic.advanced_traffic_light.c: This property is not compatible with current traffic light configuration.
gui.moretraffic.control_cabinet.title: Control Cabinet Configuration
gui.moretraffic.control_cabinet.instruct:
No instructions present, (for now)
Add them with the plus button!
Executes next action after a set amount of seconds (can be a decimal)
Pauses execution until the block receives a redstone signal
Modifies MoreTraffic lights that were added to the respective group
Modifies MoreTraffic displays that were added to the respective group with an editable image
Load pixel data from your clipboard
Copy pixel data to your clipboard. This is a string of letters, so you can paste it outside of the game too
Toggles redstone for positions in the group. Only works for MoreTraffic blocks.
gui.moretraffic.control_cabinet.export.i: Choose what to include in export
gui.moretraffic.control_cabinet.repeat.m: Currently, when one iteration ends, it starts over
Currently, when one iteration ends, it stops
gui.moretraffic.control_cabinet.groups.m: Groups allow you to group lights (and other things) from this mod to different groups and then modify them with instructions.
gui.moretraffic.control_cabinet.groups.c:
Create a new group, name it and add a position of a MoreTraffic block (you can use the /copypos command to copy coordinates).
Then, you can modify blocks in this group using instructions and targeting this group.
gui.moretraffic.control_cabinet.groups.a: You have position data in clipboard! Right Click this to add it to this group!
gui.moretraffic.led_light.title: LED Light Configuration
gui.moretraffic.led_light.message: Model be modified and then controlled with Control Cabinet. The 'Modify Light' instruction's first light color will be used.
moretraffic.configuration.title: MoreTraffic Configs
